title: Sentry Reporter
description: Reports API gateway metrics, logs and errors to Sentry.io

release.title: Release
release.description: Application release version attached to all Sentry events

serverName.title: Server Name
serverName.description: Override the server name reported to Sentry (defaults to hostname)

tracesSampleRate.title: Traces Sample Rate
tracesSampleRate.description: Fraction of HTTP requests to send as Sentry Performance transactions (0.0–1.0). Use 0.1 in production.

captureErrors.title: Capture HTTP Errors
captureErrors.description: Send HTTP 5xx responses as Sentry error events (in addition to transactions)

reportHealthChecks.title: Report Health Checks
reportHealthChecks.description: Send endpoint health-check failures as Sentry issues

reportLogs.title: Report Full Logs
reportLogs.description: Attach request/response body logs as Sentry breadcrumbs. May generate high volume.

reportMessageMetrics.title: Report Message Metrics
reportMessageMetrics.description: Report async message metrics from Event-native APIs as Sentry transactions

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Enable Sentry SDK debug logging (verbose, for troubleshooting only)
